summary: Completed comprehensive testing of L'Aura premium model directory MVP. Backend APIs working excellently (89.5% success rate), frontend UI fully functional with luxury design, admin panel operational, and mobile responsiveness confirmed.

minor_issues.issue: Returns 200 instead of expected 201 for profile creation
Returns 403 instead of expected 401 for unauthorized requests

passed_tests: Homepage hero search - successfully navigates to profiles with city filter
Profiles catalog page - displays 20+ profiles with distance calculation
Profile filters - city, age range, and sort functionality working
Profile detail page - navigation and gallery display working
Admin login - successful authentication with admin/admin123
Admin dashboard - displays correct stats (21 total, 21 active, 5 VIP, 1 message)
Contact form submission - all fields functional
All navigation pages load correctly (About, Privacy, Terms, Contacts)
Mobile responsiveness - homepage and profiles adapt correctly to 390x844 viewport
Backend API health checks - all endpoints responding
Profile API endpoints - GET, filters, single profile retrieval working
Admin authentication API - login and protected routes working
